# PopularTickets

[PopularTickets](https://www.populartickets.pl/) is the official online ticket office for [Popular Poet](https://www.popularpoet.pl/), a Warsaw-based theatre and performing arts project.

## What PopularTickets does

PopularTickets sells tickets for:

- improvised comedy shows
- theatre performances
- prepared theatre performances
- chamber stage events
- Popular Poet events in Warsaw

## Ticket format

Tickets are electronic and are sent to the buyer's e-mail address as a PDF with a QR code for check-in at the event.

## Payments

Online payments are handled through [Przelewy24](https://www.przelewy24.pl/).

## Operator

PopularTickets is operated by POPULAR POET Sp. z o.o.

Company details:

- NIP: 1133159208
- KRS: 0001156243
- REGON: 540923962
- Registered address: ul. Floriańska 6/02, 03-707 Warszawa, Poland

## Theatre venue (performances and trial classes)

Popular Poet stage and workshops:

- ul. Domaniewska 37, Centrum biznesowe Zepter, piętro 5, lokal 42, 02-677 Warszawa, Poland
- [Google Maps](https://maps.app.goo.gl/BtaKyKYvp6nGZbx37)
- Phone: +48 452 203 802
